nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer marking migration_oracle as a Python package with no public re-exports.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Click CLI entry point that wires the full export-extract-populate-framework pipeline command, orchestrating extraction, LLM filtering, entity extraction, and optional graph population with cache-flag and force-flag support.

nodes.name: _validate_model_provider
nodes.summary: Guards the pipeline command from running LLM steps when MODEL_PROVIDER is not configured, raising a ClickException with a human-readable message.

nodes.name: pipeline
nodes.summary: Core Click command implementing the export-extract-populate-framework pipeline: resolves cache flags, runs async HTTP extraction, invokes the filter and entity-extraction LLM steps, and optionally populates the Neo4j graph.

nodes.name: _cache.py
nodes.summary: Provides the CacheFlags dataclass and resolve_cache_flags function, which compute skip/reuse decisions for all three pipeline stages based on artifact existence on disk and force-flag combinations.

nodes.name: CacheFlags
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass holding six boolean skip/warning flags that represent the resolved caching decisions for a single pipeline run.

nodes.name: resolve_cache_flags
nodes.summary: Computes CacheFlags by evaluating artifact file existence against force/force-extract/force-llm flag combinations.

nodes.name: is_cached
nodes.summary: Returns True if an artifact file already exists on disk.

nodes.name: mark_cached
nodes.summary: Writes artifact content to disk, creating parent directories as needed.

nodes.name: _llm.py
nodes.summary: LLM service layer providing a LangChain provider factory (get_llm), retry-aware invocation (invoke_with_retry), and response-cleaning helpers used by both the filter and entity-extraction pipeline steps.

nodes.name: LLMInvocationError
nodes.summary: Custom RuntimeError subclass raised when an LLM invocation fails after all retries.

nodes.name: get_llm
nodes.summary: Factory function returning a LangChain BaseChatModel configured for the MODEL_PROVIDER setting.

nodes.name: invoke_with_retry
nodes.summary: Invokes a LangChain chat model with exponential backoff on rate-limit errors up to EXTRACTION_RATE_LIMIT_RETRIES attempts.

nodes.name: strip_markdown_fences
nodes.summary: Strips wrapping triple-backtick markdown/md fences from LLM responses.

nodes.name: strip_preamble
nodes.summary: Removes conversational preamble before the first severity section heading.

nodes.name: _paths.py
nodes.summary: Artifact path helpers that define the runs/ directory structure and expose path generators and a directory initialization utility.

nodes.name: ensure_runs_directories
nodes.summary: Creates the runs/raw, runs/nodes, and runs/json directories or raises an OSError if any cannot be created.

nodes.name: extractor.py
nodes.summary: Entity-extraction orchestrator that converts filtered Markdown into a validated MigrationEntitiesBatch JSON via a structured LLM call or text-based fallback.

nodes.name: ExtractionResult
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass holding the validated MigrationEntitiesBatch and the artifact Path for a completed entity-extraction run.

nodes.name: run_extraction
nodes.summary: Entry point for the entity-extraction step: reads cached JSON when flags allow, otherwise invokes the structured LLM call.

nodes.name: _invoke_structured
nodes.summary: Attempts structured LLM output via with_structured_output, falling back to raw invoke_with_retry and JSON parsing.

nodes.name: filters.py
nodes.summary: LLM filter pipeline step that converts raw changelog Markdown tables into a structured, severity-categorized Markdown document.

nodes.name: FilterResult
nodes.summary: Frozen dataclass holding the filtered Markdown string and the artifact Path for a completed filter run.

nodes.name: run_filter
nodes.summary: Executes the filter LLM step: returns cached filtered Markdown when flags allow, otherwise invokes the LLM.

nodes.name: emit_stale_warnings
nodes.summary: Prints stderr warnings when --force-extract was used but cached LLM artifacts will be reused.

nodes.name: test_cache.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for resolve_cache_flags covering JSON-cache skips, filtered-MD-cache skips, and force-extract stale warnings.

nodes.name: test_cli_cache_and_extract_only.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the CLI cache skip behaviour and --extract-only flag.

nodes.name: test_quickstart.py
nodes.summary: Quickstart integration test that exercises the full dry-run CLI path with mocked filter and entity-extraction steps.
